messages.subject: Keep your streak — your exam is March 14
messages.body: Your 7-day study streak is going strong. Big exam on March 14? Open the app and review 20 cards today to stay sharp and ready.

messages.subject: Finish your assignment faster
messages.body: Students using StudyPro finish each assignment in half the time. Your personalized plan is ready — start before April 2 to hit your goals.

messages.subject: Lock in tuition savings before April 10
messages.body: Apply by April 10 to lock in next year's tuition rate with our membership. Spots for new members are limited, so don't wait.

messages.subject: Problem Set 4
messages.body: Problem Set 4 is due March 20. Submit via the course portal before midnight; late work loses 10% per day.

messages.subject: Spring enrollment form
messages.body: You must complete your spring enrollment form by April 1 to keep your class schedule. This cannot be done after the deadline.

messages.subject: Tuition balance due
messages.body: Your tuition balance is due April 15. Pay by the deadline through the student portal to avoid a late fee and a registration hold.

messages.subject: Final exam logistics
messages.body: Our final exam is scheduled for May 2 at 9am in Hewlett 200. Bring a blue book and your student ID; no laptops permitted.

messages.subject: RSVP: build night
messages.body: Join us for robotics build night on April 8 at 6pm in the Lab. RSVP so we can order enough pizza for everyone attending.
